debug_info.goal:
α : Type
language : ContextFreeLanguage α
h✝ : ε ∈ ↑language
⊢ ∃ n,
    ∀ (z : ↑{z | z ∈ ↑language ∧ z.len ≥ n}),
      ∃ u v w x y,
        ↑z = u * v * w * x * y ∧
          (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ n ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ ↑language

    -- Apply Pumping Lemma for CNF (axiomatized)
    have exists_decomp : ∃ u' v' w' x' y' : Word G_CNF.val.Z, 
       w = u' * v' * w' * x' * y' ∧ 
       (v' * x').len ≥ 1 ∧ 
       (v' * w' * x').len ≤ 2 ^ G_CNF.val.V.card ∧ 
       (∀ i : ℕ, u' * (v'^i) * w' * (x'^i) * y' ∈ G_CNF.val.GeneratedLanguage) := by sorry

    obtain ⟨u', v', w', x', y', h_w, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := exists_decomp

    -- Map back to original alphabet
    refine ⟨coerceWord u', coerceWord v', coerceWord w', coerceWord x', coerceWord y', ?_⟩
    simp only [coerceWord, List.map_append]
    refine ⟨by rw [← w_eq_z, h_w]; simp [coerceWord, List.map_append], ?_⟩
    constructor
    · simp [Word.len, coerceWord]; rw [← List.length_append, ← List.map_append]; simp; rw [List.length_append] at h_vx ⊢; exact h_vx
    · constructor
      · simp [Word.len, coerceWord] at *; rw [← List.length_append, ← List.length_append] at h_vwx ⊢; rw [← List.map_append, ← List.map_append]; simp; exact h_vwx
      · intro k
        specialize h_pump k
        rw [← h_eq]
        apply coerceLang_mem.mpr
        have hom : coerceWord (u' * v' ^ k * w' * x' ^ k * y') = 
                   coerceWord u' * (coerceWord v') ^ k * coerceWord w' * (coerceWord x') ^ k * coerceWord y' := by sorry
        rw [← hom]
        apply coerceLang_mem.mp
        exact h_pump

have h_diff_exists : ∃ L' : ContextFreeLanguage, ∀ w, w ∈ L'.val ↔ w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε := by sorry
      obtain ⟨L', h_L'⟩ := h_diff_exists
      
      have h_not_eps_L' : ε ∉ L'.val := by
        intro h
        rw [h_L'] at h
        exact h.2 rfl

      obtain ⟨n', hn'⟩ := h_lemma_no_eps L' h_not_eps_L'
      use (max n' 1)
      intro z
      
      have h_z_not_eps : z.val ≠ ε := by
        intro h
        have h_len := z.property.2
        rw [h] at h_len
        simp at h_len
        have : 1 ≤ 0 := Nat.le_trans (le_max_right n' 1) h_len
        contradiction
        
      have h_z_in_L' : z.val ∈ L'.val := by
        rw [h_L']
        exact ⟨z.property.1, h_z_not_eps⟩
        
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_decomp⟩ := hn' z.val ⟨h_z_in_L', Nat.le_trans (le_max_left n' 1) z.property.2⟩
      use u, v, w, x, y
      refine ⟨h_decomp.1, h_decomp.2.1, h_decomp.2.2.1, ?_⟩
      intro k
      have hk := h_decomp.2.2.2 k
      rw [h_L'] at hk
      exact hk.1

      let n := 2 ^ cnf.val.V.card

      have h_z_in : z.val ∈ coerceLang cnf.val.GeneratedLanguage := by
        rw [← h_eq, hL]
        exact z.property.1
      obtain ⟨w, hw_in, hw_coe⟩ := coerceCFGLang_mem_imp_word_of_type z.val cnf.val h_z_in
      have h_len : w.len ≥ n := by
        rw [← hw_coe] at z
        simp [coerceWord, Word.len] at z
        exact z.property.2
      -- The decomposition follows from the properties of CNF derivations of sufficient length

      have exists_pump : ∃ u v x y w_mid, z.val = u * v * w_mid * x * y ∧ (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w_mid * x).len ≤ n ∧ ∀ k, u * (v^k) * w_mid * (x^k) * y ∈ language.val := sorry
      exact exists_pump

let L_diff_val : Language α := fun w => w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε
      have h_cf : L_diff_val.is_context_free := sorry -- Standard closure property
      let L_diff : ContextFreeLanguage := ⟨L_diff_val, h_cf⟩
      have h_not_eps : ε ∉ L_diff.val := fun h => h.2 rfl
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := pumping_lemma_eps_free L_diff h_not_eps
      exists n
      intros z hz
      have z_ne_eps : z.val ≠ ε := by
        intro heq; rw [heq] at hz
        -- n is constructed to be >= 1
        have : n ≥ 1 := sorry 
        have : z.val.len = 0 := Word.eps_len_0.mp heq
        rw [this] at hz; have := hz.2; linarith
      have z_in_diff : z.val ∈ L_diff.val := ⟨hz.1, z_ne_eps⟩
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_decomp, h1, h2, h3⟩ := hn ⟨z.val, z_in_diff, hz.2⟩
      exists u, v, w, x, y
      refine ⟨h_decomp, h1, h2, ?_⟩
      intro k
      exact (h3 k).1
    case neg =>
      apply pumping_lemma_eps_free language h
